title: Build LoadRoad enterprise connector system
description: Legacy system connectors (SAP, JDE, PeopleSoft, Workday). Abstract bloated ERPs with clean API layer. Auto-fill forms, understand context, unify data across silos. Enable rapid enterprise integration.
result: ✅ LoadRoad enterprise connector system deployed! Supports SAP, JDE, PeopleSoft, Workday, Oracle, Salesforce integration. Live at blackroad-api.pages.dev/loadroad. Modern API layer abstracting legacy systems.
